chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4231 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No. 17527/2025 (Urgent/A) 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 5 3. For order on Misc. No. 17528/2025 (Exemption/A) 4. For hearing of main case 29.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Arshad Mughal Advocate for the Petitioner.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner is a Rickshaw Driver and that due to his past conduct the Counter Terrorism Department and the Pakistan Rangers still harass and bother him. The law enforcement agencies are directed to act in accordance with law. Let a copy of this order be sent to the SHO of the concerned Police Station for information and compliance. Petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
